marketing.heroSubtitle: Deploy bilingual voice and chat agents with enterprise knowledge, security, and on-prem options.
marketing.useCasesSubtitle: From municipalities to banks — agents that speak Montenegrin naturally.
marketing.howStep1Desc: Sign up and configure your organization in minutes.
marketing.howStep2Desc: Upload policies, FAQs, and documents with access controls.
marketing.howStep3Desc: Embed in your site or connect voice channels.
marketing.knowledgeDesc: Hybrid retrieval, reranking, and access groups keep answers accurate and compliant.
marketing.securityDesc: Session auth, CSRF protection, tenant isolation, and audit trails.
marketing.deploymentDesc: Run fully managed or deploy on-prem for regulated industries.
marketing.pricingSubtitle: Start free, scale as you grow.
marketing.ctaSubtitle: Create your workspace and launch your first agent today.

auth.googleOnly: Use your Google account to continue. No password or verification email required.
auth.googleNotConfigured: Google sign-in is not configured. Set PUBLIC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID in .env.
auth.googleLoadFailed: Could not load Google sign-in. Check your connection and try again.
auth.googleNotReady: Google sign-in is still loading. Please try again.
auth.inviteAcceptDesc: Join the workspace you've been invited to.
auth.inviteAcceptInvalid: This invitation is invalid or expired.
auth.inviteAcceptMismatch: Sign in with the email address that received the invitation.
auth.termsConsent: By signing up you agree to our

quota.exceeded: Plan limit reached for {metric} ({current}/{limit}). Upgrade your plan to continue.

onboarding.title: Set up your workspace
onboarding.step5Desc: Upload PDF, Word, text, or Markdown files. Your agent will use them for more accurate answers.
onboarding.uploadPrompt: Drag files here or click to browse
onboarding.uploadHint: PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD, and more — up to 25 MB per file
onboarding.driveDesc: Drive import is coming soon — it requires separate Google permissions and integration beyond sign-in.
onboarding.step7Desc: Click Continue to publish your agent and enable voice in the playground.
onboarding.publishMissingVersion: No agent version to publish. Go back and configure the agent again.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.browserDesc: Embed Montenegrina in your website with a lightweight script.
integrations.phoneDesc: Connect telephony for inbound and outbound voice via LiveKit Cloud SIP.
integrations.phoneSetupHint: Configure LiveKit SIP trunks in docs/product/saas-platform.md, then assign an inbound agent.
integrations.phoneDisabledHint: Set PHONE_INTEGRATIONS_ENABLED=true and configure LiveKit Cloud SIP trunks to manage numbers.
integrations.deletePhoneConfirm: Remove this phone number from your workspace?

conversations.pageDesc: Review past voice and phone conversations.
conversations.emptyDesc: Start a conversation in the playground.

team.title: Team
team.inviteCreated: Invitation link created. Share it with the invited person.
team.quotaExceeded: Team member limit reached for your plan.

agents.pageDesc: Create, edit, and manage voice and chat agents.
agents.name: Name
agents.instructionsHint: Saving changes to instructions creates a new version and publishes it automatically.
agents.publishedSuccess: Agent published. Voice is now available in the playground.
agents.deleteConfirm: Delete agent "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
agents.emptyDesc: Create your first agent to get started.
